/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -pedantic -Wno-long-long -Wall -Wextra -Wcast-align -Wcast-qual -Wformat -Wwrite-strings -Wconversion   -shared -Wl,-soname,libodri_control_interface.so -o libodri_control_interface.so CMakeFiles/odri_control_interface.dir/src/joint_modules.cpp.o CMakeFiles/odri_control_interface.dir/src/imu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/odri_control_interface.dir/src/robot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/odri_control_interface.dir/src/calibration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/odri_control_interface.dir/src/utils.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/zihaoye/devel/workspace/install/master_board_sdk/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libyaml-cpp.so.0.6.2 /home/zihaoye/devel/workspace/install/master_board_sdk/lib/libmaster_board_sdk.so -lpthread
